Worker 1 completed: segments [4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9]
All workers completed
FAIL: Data corruption from concurrent writes

cmd: cd /app && sed -i 's/let end = std::cmp::min(start + segments_per_worker + 2, self.num_segments);/let end = std::cmp::min(start + segments_per_worker, self.num_segments);/' src/config.rs
